name: Electric Jellyfish
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>電</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>気</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>海月</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くらげ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－フィサリア－
desc: You can send 1 "Umi" from your hand, Deck, or face-up field to the GY; Special Summon 1 WATER monster from your hand. When your opponent activates a monster effect, or Spell Card or effect, while "Umi" is on the field (Quick Effect): You can negate that effect, then, you can make this card gain 600 ATK/DEF. You can only use each effect of "Electric Jellyfish" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can send 1 "Umi" from your hand, Deck, or face-up field to the GY; Special Summon 1 WATER monster from your hand. When your opponent activates a monster effect, or Spell Card or effect, while "Umi" is on the field (Quick Effect): You can negate that effect, then, you can make this card gain 600 ATK/DEF. You can only use each effect of "Electric Jellyfish" once per turn.

sets.set: Legendary Duelists: Duels From the Deep

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
